CREATE TABLE blobs1 (data BLOB);
CREATE TABLE blobs2 (data BLOB);
INSERT INTO blobs1 VALUES ('\xAA');
INSERT INTO blobs2 VALUES ('\xBB');
SELECT data FROM blobs1 || data FROM blobs2;
SELECT (data1 || data2) FROM (SELECT data AS data1 FROM blobs1) t1, (SELECT data AS data2 FROM blobs2) t2;
CREATE TABLE blobs3 (data1 BLOB, data2 BLOB);
INSERT INTO blobs3 VALUES ('\xAA', '\xBB');
SELECT data1 || data2 FROM blobs3;
SELECT (SELECT data FROM blobs1) || (SELECT data FROM blobs2);
CREATE TABLE test_blob_concat (id INTEGER, data BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_blob_concat VALUES (1, '\xAA'), (2, '\xBB');
SELECT t1.data || t2.data FROM test_blob_concat t1 JOIN test_blob_concat t2 ON t1.id < t2.id;
SELECT (SELECT data FROM blobs1 WHERE data IS NOT NULL) || (SELECT data FROM blobs2 WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE complex_blobs (id INTEGER, blob_data1 BLOB, blob_data2 BLOB);
INSERT INTO complex_blobs VALUES (1, '\xAA', '\xCC'), (2, '\xBB', '\xDD');
SELECT blob_data1 || blob_data2 FROM complex_blobs WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(blob_data1) FROM complex_blobs) || (SELECT MAX(blob_data2) FROM complex_blobs);
CREATE TABLE large_blobs (big_data BLOB);
INSERT INTO large_blobs VALUES ('\x' || repeat('A', 1048576)), ('\x' || repeat('B', 1048576));
SELECT big_data FROM large_blobs WHERE LENGTH(big_data) = 1048576;
SELECT (SELECT big_data FROM large_blobs LIMIT 1) || (SELECT big_data FROM large_blobs LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1);
SELECT (SELECT 'blob1'::BLOB) || (SELECT 'blob2'::BLOB) AS concatenated;
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT data FROM blobs1), '') || COALESCE((SELECT data FROM blobs2), '');
